nasb.text: On the ninth day of the fourth month the famine was so severe in the city that there was no food for the people of the land.

esv.text: On the ninth day of the fourth month the famine was so severe in the city that there was no food for the people of the land.

cnv.text: 四月九日，城裡饑荒非常嚴重，甚至那地的人民都斷了糧食。

ccb.text: 那年四月九日，城里饥荒非常严重，百姓无粮可吃。
